summary:
GLOBAL CONFLICT AND GEOPOLITICAL PROPHECIES: Brandon recounts a prophetic vision concerning a major military escalation involving BRICS nations, China, North Korea, and Russia. He describes seeing an explosion on the border of North and South Korea, with China rising like a fierce red dragon out of a volcano to back North Korea. Brandon mentions secret alliance meetings involving Iran, Venezuela, Cuba, and Afghanistan, characterizing these movements as strategic land grabs resembling the Beast system. He also foresees the red horse of war riding rapidly, bringing subsequent famine and pestilence, alongside a massive, earth-altering volcano erupting in Asia and geopolitical shifts involving Taiwan, Japan, and the British monarchy under King Charles.

THE NEW HEAVEN AND NEW EARTH: Brandon describes a profound spiritual glimpse past the tribulation into a newly created earth that resembles the Garden of Eden. He observes a world devoid of death and pollution, featuring incredibly vibrant, thick green grass, alive atmospheres, and brilliant pink and yellow skies. Brandon notes that this transformation occurs instantaneously through a massive, galaxy-sized portal, revealing a pristine, glowing blue planet where humanity emerges into a perfect, glorified state to reign for a thousand years.

HEAVENLY RECEPTION PREPARATIONS: Brandon shares an intimate encounter where Jesus reveals the ongoing preparations for the Marriage Supper of the Lamb. He witnesses endless banquet tables adorned with transparent glass plates, culturally appropriate utensils, personalized name tags, and intricate lace tablecloths. Brandon describes trees draped with white tulle, glowing twinkle lights, and heavenly moss, while Jesus rides down a golden street on a magnificent white horse decorated with unimaginable jewels. He recounts seeing his wife joyfully doing cartwheels in heaven's perfect grass and hearing a massive parade of believers chanting praises to the King of Kings outside a glorious castle.

URGENT CALL FOR SALVATION AND HARVEST: Brandon emphasizes that the current dispensation of grace is rapidly coming to an end, warning that the world is standing at the door of the tribulation. He speaks of a specific prophetic timeline, mentioning a ten-year window that began in 2020 and a critical three-year period for a major spiritual harvest before the next Shemitah cycle around 2028 or 2029. Brandon urgently implores listeners to abandon lukewarm faith, completely surrender to Jesus Christ, and undergo water baptism, stressing that true salvation is based on an intimate, daily relationship with God rather than mere religious works.

ANGELIC VISITATIONS AND SPIRITUAL WARFARE: Brandon details several intense supernatural encounters, including a visitation from two angels who instructed him that treating others with love is the ultimate heavenly metric. He recounts waking up to his house shaking and seeing four hideous, pig-like demons trying to attack, only to realize they were effortlessly blocked by massive, chained guardian angels who simply laughed and worshiped God. Brandon also shares an experience at a dangerous gas station where his spiritual eyes were opened to see a giant protecting angel, and he reveals that God has assigned four specific angels to assist his upcoming healing ministry, cautioning believers to focus entirely on God's glory rather than empowering the devil through constant talk and fear.
rawData: [September 15, 2025]-[The Lord showed me a parade that will take place after the rapture in heaven]-[https://youtu.be/3FqtRlMU1wM]-[Well, good evening, family. I truly believe we're about to see some of these things. I see it. Can you hear it? If it has sound, tell us in the chat. Explosion. I see fire. I see almost like what you'd see when you say TNT across it. And I see the fire coming out of it. And it's fire, and it's like a bomb went off on the border of South Korea and North Korea. And on the far west side where it's at, not all the way out into the ocean, but right in there, I see some kind of a disturbance there. There's a disturbance trying to break out war there. Trying to break out war. And now I see China provoking. It's like a provoking right here with North Korea, and China backing North Korea. It's what I've seen again with Kim Jong-un being backed by China and Russia, bringing forth this alliance with the BRICS. Why would North Korea want a war with South Korea? What is that all about? What in the world? You know, it's about China. I see China trying to rise up like a dragon, a great dragon. But in the days ahead, you'll see movement. Now, I'm not saying when. I see a movement. China coming up, trying to come up like out of a volcano. I see a red dragon coming up out of a volcano as a fierce dragon. I see fire coming from the dragon's mouth, flaming toward South Korea. I see flames coming out of the mouth. Now, I see Japan again. I see Japan. He's being promised a lot. North Korea, Kim Jong-un, they're being promised a lot. It makes him confident. There are secret meetings. I'm telling you, there are secret meetings. It's like what I see about North Korea, China, and Russia becoming one. And then I see Iran. And I see an alliance of these countries, almost like they're thinking as one, like a covenant. And then, oh, I was going to Venezuela, and I see Venezuela being promised things. And now I'm in Cuba, and I see Cuba being promised things. And I see alliances of Cuba, Venezuela, and the countries that have been like outcasts. Afghanistan, it's like there are minerals. There's something in Afghanistan that is minerals. There's value there. Oh, I see Taiwan. So, South Korea and Taiwan, it's like they're alliances of America, but China wants it. Does that make sense? Taiwan and South Korea. What's interesting is what I'm hearing is people only look at what they see in that year. But what is the year? They don't believe what we believe about the Bible. They don't believe what we believe about the end times. So they're looking at a 50-year projection, a 10-year projection. Where will we be in the next how many decades? How do we get this land like a united communism over South Korea causing war? I saw an explosion on the border, and then I saw South Korea not be able to, like, retaliate, like China's backing up North Korea, coming to the aid, but it's all about North Korea. And it was like a joint effort, like they're all trying to work together to make greater on their end, to make themselves greater, similar to Trump trying to say Greenland and all these other things, Canada becoming one with America. All these like land grabs, land grabs, bettering the good further into what the new world would be. What the new world would be, not the way the world is right now. Russia wanting the old Soviet Union, Ukraine, Poland, wanting that old land back, calling a new, stronger Soviet Union with the new old KGB thinking, trying to play this game of chess, all lining up with the Beast system. These people, these people are led by their own egos, trying to make their nation like this because the tariffs are tipping them off. I saw people moving strategically. That's very, very like Cuba lining up with Russia. I'm telling you, I see it coming underneath those sanctions, trying to bring them out of that. But it would be a base clear down there so strong, being so close to America. That's very dangerous, like it was with Greenland. It's strategic like Risk, like that game, power people moving in positions with the spirit of war. And it is the red horse. It's the red horse. I saw the red horse when I looked at my wife's face. I saw it right here. The red horse was riding quickly. The red horse of war is riding quickly. And therefore, on the heels of this horse, the green horse, the chlorophyll horse, and the black horse will ride hand in hand together, for famine and pestilence will go hand in hand together. War, war, war. I see Hawaii. Everything is going to change. I don't know if I'm looking into the tribulation or not. That went so far ahead. Surely that's tribulation, surely. Oh, the great mystery, Babylon. Oh my goodness. I see a volcano going off, and it looks... it's right in Asia. I don't know, it looks like it could be Japan, those islands right in there. It's like a major volcano, a massive volcano. I'm talking, this is a massive volcano, a massive, humongous volcano to change the face of the earth, like that big. This is a massive volcano, and I see lava flowing down the side of this mountain. I know it's in Asia, y'all. I think I'm looking over into the tribulation. Now, I'll tell you what I'm looking at. I'm looking at Canada. And then it went from Canada all the way into the royals with England, and I saw King Charles. And then it went, and I just saw it barely influencing Australia. You see Canada, England, Australia with the king, the king of England. What is that? I see it. Oh, and now I'm in Ireland. It's like a scorpion looking into that. As I look into that, I don't even know how to describe it with words. My vocabulary is not big enough. It's past the tribulation. I saw past the tribulation with a new heaven and a new earth. Some things you just can't say out loud. Some things I just can't speak out with my words. It looks like beautiful, beautiful yellows and all kinds of different colors, almost like a galaxy. But I saw new grass, I saw new land features, I saw the people coming out of... it's like they were in like when you come out of a fraidy hole. The people, it's like they come up in this new land, and it was green, and it was like the Garden of Eden. It was like the Garden of Eden all over again. Everything was alive. The trees, everything was like what I've told you when I've seen the Garden of Eden. Everything was new. Like, there's no pollution. There was no—all of it was brand new, and it happened in a moment, just like that. But it came out of the Spirit, and it transformed everything in a matter of just a word, like, all in front of my face I could see it, and it changed, and there was a new everything. He said, "Behold, I make all things new. Watch." And all the green and all the fields, everything was fresh, like a new everything. The sky was full of light again, but there was no darkness. The canopy above the earth, the atmosphere above the earth, looked like beautiful colors. I saw pinks and yellows. I told you what was above Adam and Eve in the garden and the new heaven and the new earth. It's like everything just changed like this and went instantaneously—I don't know how to describe it to you—but I was looking in, and it was moving like a movie screen. Everything was coming so fast, babe. And I could see wars. I could see all these things and the plans. And all of a sudden, humanity itself stopped. And all of a sudden, everything was made new. And we, the body, the bride—it's like we are here. Everything was fresh and new, like a new heaven, new earth, new glory. Everything that we have ever known is about to change for that thousand-year reign again. I saw a glimpse of it again. I saw it. That doesn't happen very often, but I want to just camp there. But when I try to describe it, I can't. Beautiful. I feel this fire all over me. Oh, He has so much in store for us for a thousand years. People better get excited about it. I can't explain to you how green everything was. The grass and the trees and the bushes, there was no death. There was no death. Like, you know, you see a dead limb here and there, outside—you go outside, there's a dead tree limb. There was no death. There were no dead brown leaves. Everything is alive and green. The sky is alive. The very atmosphere is alive. And even the grass was perfect. It was green, but it's thick, almost like you see that old Easter basket grass. How thick—I don't know how else to describe it to you. Like you'd see moss on trees. It's so thick, and like you could breathe it in and eat it, drink it, like the grass. Everything is so alive. And I could just look into it, but I was pulling back and I looked over here and I could see it. And as far as I could see, there was new. It was new, and it was beautiful, and pinks and yellows, and the sky was so alive. But it happened as a swirl above the atmosphere, you know, like a portal opened up, and all of a sudden this portal was turning, and all of a sudden it just came out of it, all this new, and it just transformed everything. But the portal was opened, and I could see it was like the size of a galaxy. It was massive. And all of a sudden, I saw this blue dot that looked like an Earth. It came out of it, and I thought it was an atom—like an atom, like you see particles. That's what I thought I was looking at. But it was something new. As I was praying about the King and all these other things, and I could see a scorpion's tail—I saw a scorpion. It was a part of that. And all of a sudden, I kept going and going. It was like I was going faster and faster. And I could see the King of England. And I could see there was so much demonic attached to that, with the Illuminati and things like that. And I was in the Spirit, and I could see it, and it was pulling me. So, I gave you part of what happened that day when we prayed together. That was the part I wanted you to see, the end of it. He gave you a lot of the whole video, you know, about North Korea and all that. But I wanted you to hear what's coming, to give you some hope, to get you stirred up even more. When I go back over that and I'm hearing that again, it stirs me to intercede and start praying again. Folks, there's so much to look forward to: a new heaven, a new earth. Behold, He's going to make all things new. You know, I feel to talk about what happens after the rapture. I was praying one day, just like I always do, and I said, "Lord, how was Your day today? What went on in Your world?" You know, just trying to be as intimate as I can with Him. "Hey, how are things going?" You know, I talk to God like I talk to my son or my wife. I'm not religious. I just talk to Him like He is right here, an ever-present help in a time of need, because He's my friend. And I said, "How are things going today?" And He said, "Brendon, I'll show you what we're doing today." And if you want to believe this, fine. If you don't, fine. It was real to me, and it's what happened. All of a sudden, a portal opened up above me, and He allowed me to come up through it, and He said, "We're getting ready for your return." And I saw a banquet table. There were tables all around for the Marriage Supper of the Lamb, for a banquet, a rehearsal. It was a wedding feast. It was like a beautiful reception. Everybody's plates were perfect. Some of them looked like lilies, but they were transparent, beautiful glass plates and china and silverware. Beautiful, beautiful place settings. And each one of them—some of them had chopsticks on them, some of them weren't like nice silverware, some of them had chopsticks depending on your culture. He honored the culture of the person. But every single one of them had a place setting of your name. There was a name on the plate, and it had your reserved seat on your plate. Behind was a beautiful chair that was carved out of some kind of beautiful wood. It was the most beautiful chair I've ever seen before. All of the flowers were draping it, and it was all set up perfectly to celebrate your coming. There's a reception coming, a reception that He has for you as we cross over. The tables, the doilies, and the beautiful white linen were all on this table. The tablecloth was all like lace, like somebody had crocheted it. It was a beautiful place, and the way the table was decorated with the most beautiful flowers that were alive with fragrances—they were in these vases that were all on these tables as far as the eye could see. Then I could see tulle. There was big—you know how you go down in the South, in like the Louisiana area, and they have the moss on them. When we went to Florida, they had greenery growing on the trees that looked kind of like moss, but it was dangling off the trees down in Florida. And so much so that when I saw it, I stopped and pulled the car over because I said, "I've seen that in heaven." When the Lord allowed me to, I pulled over, and I broke some off the trees so I could touch it, because up in Oklahoma, we don't have that, and I've never seen that or felt it before. And it felt soft. But when I saw it in heaven, it was draping off the trees. But there was beautiful tulle, beautiful white tulle and stuff wrapped in the trees with twinkle lights all inside of them—beautiful lights, lighting the trees that were draping over the tables. And there were flowers beyond human comprehension. There were flowers all around on these tables: white flowers, yellow flowers, red flowers. Beautiful reception. And all of it was being prepared for every single one of us. And your name tag was on your plates, like I said. And I could see my name tag. I could see my wife's. I could see every single one of these places that were made for every single one of us. And it was all by our heart's desire. Whatever is inside of you, what you're believing for, the greatest expectation, ladies and gentlemen, God has it inside there, and He's going to bring it to pass. Watch. And as I saw they were getting over to the side, I could see Jesus and he was riding on a white horse. There was jewels all on the side of this horse's bridle, all around his ears. And it was jewels. The most beautiful jewels—the world in all the finest jewelry stores that you've ever seen cannot compare to what I saw. The massive diamonds and the rubies and the sapphires, the beautiful splendor of heaven and the jewelry around this horse's bridle. He was up there just like he always is with that beautiful cloak on. His crown has a beautiful black and white embroidery around it with purple on top and jewels all over his crown. His cape has purple and it has this black and white thing that I saw around it. And it has this tassel that buttons it up here that's all fine jewelry and it's handcrafted. It's gorgeous. Gorgeous, the way that the stuff goes around his cloak. And he was riding on the horse and I could see on these streets of gold, there was the most beautiful streets of gold. And he was riding down this street, but there was people with banners that were on the side of the street that had 'King of Kings and Lord of Lords' all on the side of these banners. And they were dripping in purple, the most beautiful, brilliant purple I've ever seen with gold all around them. And they had the staffs and they were standing on the side of the street and there were people of all kinds from all kinds of generations is what I'm going to say. The way they looked, on this side of the street there were what looked like English style homes that were cobblestone with beautiful roofs. It looked like something out of medieval times, but it was all perfect, the way all the grout and all the stuff was on these buildings as I can remember it even still like today, I can quote it back to you perfectly. But as he was riding down, I could hear instruments playing music that was so beautiful, beyond anything I can describe to you. And they were playing behind him and they were having a parade. They were parading on this gold street and they were saying, 'For he is good and his mercy endures forever; for the Lord, he is good and his mercy endures forever.' And they were shouting and you could hear it and it was echoing all throughout the land. I could hear it in heaven. It was echoing and it was almost deafening how loud it was: 'For the Lord, he is good and his mercy endures forever.' And they were saying it and they just kept saying it. And I could see this like confetti in the air. It was like beautiful stuff flying in the air all around. It was being kept all as he was marching in on his horse. They were preparing for us to come. And I could hear, 'For the Lord, he is good and his mercy endures forever.' And at the end of the road, I could see this massive castle that had the most beautiful sides. It was a massive castle, but there was a bridge and on this bridge I could see, going through here, I could see a stream, but on the other side of the bridge, it was the most beautiful trees and the most beautiful green grass. And there was a beautiful—all up here—a massive castle on a hill, and I still don't know what that castle is, but I'm telling you, ladies and gentlemen, it is the most beautiful place you can comprehend, like a gorgeous castle, and it was all kinds of stones and stuff inside this castle. But he said, 'Brandon, there's parade practice today. We're celebrating, getting ready to celebrate you. I'm getting ready to come back for my church. I'm getting ready to come back for my church.' He said, 'And all this is the reception for when you come home.' The day it happens, I saw the valleys whenever we first show up and we're raptured. I made it into heaven and I could see the beautiful green grass as far as the eye could see. And my wife was doing cartwheels and she said, 'Brandon, we made it! Brandon, we made it! It truly happened, we're here!' And she was doing cartwheels and somersaults all inside of this grass. And I was just at the top of the hill watching her roll down the hill, just excited to be there, rolling down and just rejoicing and praising the Lord that it finally had happened. I remember just looking out over the edge of it all, and there were beautiful mountains, beautiful mountains in heaven with snow on the top. Everything was gorgeous. And I remember just looking at the grass and all the flowers, and I was trying to take it in, this vision, this impartation that I was having, and I didn't want to leave it. I thought, 'Oh, God. I look for the day when he comes, ladies and gentlemen, but we have so much work to do to tell the people that he's coming. He's standing at the door of eternity. Grace as we know it is about to change. We're about to step into the tribulation. Do you understand? This dispensation of grace is coming to an end. Tribulation is about to begin.' And that's what I try to tell you all, that I don't believe we're going through the tribulation. The church, the ones that have their lamps full of oil—there were 10 virgins, five had their lamps full and five didn't. I believe he comes back for the ones that have their lamps full. And all the beauty of the trees and the flowers. Even whenever I saw Lucy, you know, I've told you that a couple weeks ago, they were all praying and interceding for what's happening on the earth, calling for a revival. Lucy was there and Brother Halverson and there were so many others. They were on this beautiful quilt. If you have not seen that, you can watch it. It just happened a couple weeks ago when the Lord warned us about this and he said, 'They're praying for revival in Minnesota. They're praying for revival in these areas, ladies and gentlemen.' And I truly believe we're at the edge of something major that is about to take place. And as you've seen what I tried to describe to you with my English vocabulary the best I could, of what the new heaven and the new earth, what he is creating for us for the thousand years, is the most beautiful. We've never experienced anything like the lion and the lamb lying together. We've never experienced not experiencing death or pain or suffering of any kind. Some people wake up with a headache, some people might wake up with a toothache. Who knows? We all have a body that is dying every day. We get closer and closer to the day we're going home. But when we have our glorified body and we're over there with the Father, oh, what a day! You know, what a day of rejoicing that will be when we all get to heaven, we'll sing and shout the victory. When we all get to heaven, what a day of rejoicing that will be. When we all see Jesus, we'll sing and shout the victory. Those old hymns mean something. They weren't written to win a Dove Award; they were written just because they wanted to worship Jesus. I still pull them out. My wife got me an old song book because I like to look at those old songs. But the most important part today is knowing that we're so close to something major about to happen. And I tell you all this to fan that flame inside of you, to give you a hope, that even if Charlie wanted to come back—you know, people said, 'Brandon, raise him from the dead.' He stepped over; he was over there too long, folks. Do you understand? It'd be like pulling teeth to try to get him to come back. Once you experience the glory, once you experience the splendor and the majesty of heaven, the smells, the fragrances, the beauty of what he has for us, with just the glimpses that I've been given that I've treasured for so long, I'll never forget it. It's like Diana says, when she had a visitation the other night, she said, "I didn't want to wake up from it." Things that we don't share publicly. "I didn't want to wake up from it. I just wanted to stay there. I fought so bad. Please don't let me wake up from this because it was such a beautiful encounter with the Father." God is no respecter of persons. And the same Holy Spirit that visits us, and the visitations that my wife and I have, and my children have, I'm telling you, He'll visit you. He loves every single one of you. He loves every single one of us unconditionally. But if you don't know Him tonight, and I'm telling you all this, and you say, "How do I get to go? What pays my ticket to go to heaven? How do I?" It's by accepting Jesus Christ as your Lord and personal Savior. It's by dying to self and saying, "Jesus, I don't want any more of the world. I want You. I want to tell people about You. I want to lead them to Christ just like I'm being led to Christ right now. I want to tell them that there's a heaven to gain and a hell to shun." If you're here tonight and you don't know Jesus, you've heard a lot about Him, but does He know you? That's the bottom line. Does Jesus know you? The Bible says in that day that many will come and say, "Lord, I prophesied in Your name. I laid hands on the sick in Your name. I cast out devils in Your name." And He says, "Depart from me. I never knew you." You could do all those things. And I've said this a lot. It takes a little faith to raise the dead. It takes some faith to cast out a devil. But you can do all those things and He can say to you, "Depart from me. I never knew you." It's Scripture. Does He know you? Does He have a relationship with you? I'm not talking about works. I'm not talking about something you tried to do to impress Him. "By grace you are saved through faith, not of works, lest any man should boast." It is by grace. But I want to tell you it's about a relationship. It's about Him knowing you. And if you're here today and you say, "I don't want to go to hell, Brandon. I don't want to go to hell. I'm having a really hard time right now. All people are dying on the news. You've got cops getting shot in the throat. You've got stuff going on in Chicago. You've got war going on, rumors of war. You've got the war in Israel. You've got all these things." And it's very troubling to the natural mind. Very troubling. If you focus on it, it tries to suck you in. But I'm here to tell you that Jesus Christ paid the price for you not to have to go to hell. Jesus paid the price for you to not have to have sickness in your body. Jesus paid the price for you to walk in victory in every area of your life. But you have never surrendered to Him is what I'm trying to say. "I surrender to You. I make You my Lord. I turn my back on the world and I say I'm all in tonight." I want to give you an opportunity to accept Jesus Christ as your Lord and personal Savior. I tell you all these beautiful things that are awaiting the believer—for the person who says, "I'm sold out to Jesus"—the ones when you spend time with Him daily, then He knows you. That's how you know your wife. That's how you know your husband, right? The more you spend time with them, you can say, "I really know him or her," right? "I know them." But if I don't spend time with my wife but once a month or once a year, maybe every once in a while when church is there on Sundays, they'll have an Easter service and I'll go just because it's the right thing to do on an Easter or a Sunday—or a Christmas service, a candlelight service. We all go as a family because we just want to celebrate Jesus's birth. "Let's go and have a candlelight service." But other than that, you don't ever go through the doorway of a church. You're just off in La La Land. I'm talking about the people who are sold out. He said, "If you're lukewarm, I'll spew you out of my mouth." He'd rather you be hot or cold. "If you're lukewarm, He'll spew you out of His mouth." It's time to be hot for Jesus or be cold. If you don't want to be in it, don't ride the fence is what I'm trying to tell you. There's no lukewarm. It's time to be all in. We are in the last of the last seconds here before the coming of the Lord Jesus Christ. He even told Rodney—I was listening to a revival in Tulsa here at the center, and he said the Lord told him we have a window, and he went up into 2028, 2029. He was saying the Lord told him He gave him a window in 2020 about the COVID and all the things going on. He said there was a whirlwind that whipped him up, and he got sucked up. And the Lord told him, "I'm giving you a 10-year window." And what have I told you all? The next Shemitah cycle. The next Shemitah cycle. There are a lot of people who say, "I believe it's the 23rd. I believe it's the next Shemitah cycle," which would be 2028 going into '29. It's that time frame. And I believe the Lord has given us a three-year window for a major harvest right now. And on a scale of eternity, that is nothing. Nothing. What will you do with this window of opportunity? The Lord said, "A great shaking to awaken is here." And I'm telling you, if you're here right now and you feel that tugging on the inside of you—and as I've told you all, you feel that stirring on the inside of you—and you say, "Brandon, what must I do to be saved?" Do you feel that? The Bible says that no man comes to the Father unless he's drawn by Him. And if you feel that inside, that's the Holy Spirit tugging at your heart. He's at the door of your life and He's knocking. "Will you let me help you? Will you let me change you from the inside out?" You're broke. You're busted. You're disgusted. Your marriage is strung out. You're on drugs. You're strung out on alcohol. You've got all these problems of sexual perversion. You've got all these things, and you're trying to fix it yourself. But Jesus Christ wants to fix your issues and help you turn your mess into a message. I believe it's appointed unto man once to die, and after that the judgment. I don't believe in reincarnation. I don't believe in any other kind of religion other than Jesus Christ. He's the only way. The only way to the Father is the Lord Jesus Christ. So I want you today to make a decision. I want you to make a decision either way. You either serve Him or you don't. It's your choice. But I pray today you make the right choice. I pray today that you say, "I'm sold out for Jesus." What more do you have? I believe it's a heaven to gain or a hell to shun. Do you understand? There's no in-between. "Well, I believe we go into nothingness. I believe we turn into a dove."
